   248→
   249→/// Main Object struct - the core game entity
   250→#[derive(Debug)]
   251→pub struct Object {
   252→    // Core identification
   253→    id: ObjectID,
   254→    producer_id: ObjectID,
   255→    builder_id: ObjectID,
   256→    name: AsciiString,
   257→    
   258→    // Linked list pointers for efficient iteration
   259→    next: Option<Arc<RwLock<Object>>>,
   260→    prev: Option<Weak<RwLock<Object>>>,
   261→    
   262→    // Status and state
   263→    status: ObjectStatusMaskType,
   264→    private_status: u8,
   265→    script_status: u8,
   266→    
   267→    // Geometry and position
   268→    geometry_info: GeometryInfo,
   269→    health_box_offset: Coord3D,
   270→    i_pos: ICoord3D,
   271→    
   272→    // Team and ownership
   273→    team: Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>>,
   274→    original_team_name: AsciiString,
   275→    indicator_color: Color,
   276→    
   277→    // Modules - using Arc<Mutex<>> for thread safety
   278→    behaviors: Vec<Arc<Mutex<dyn BehaviorModule>>>,
   279→    body: Option<Arc<Mutex<dyn BodyModuleInterface>>>,
   280→    contain: Option<Arc<Mutex<dyn ContainModuleInterface>>>,
   281→    stealth: Option<Arc<Mutex<dyn StealthUpdate>>>,
   282→    ai: Option<Arc<Mutex<dyn AIUpdateInterface>>>,
   283→    physics: Option<Arc<Mutex<dyn PhysicsBehavior>>>,
   284→    
   285→    // Helper modules
   286→    repulsor_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<ObjectRepulsorHelper>>>,
   287→    smc_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<ObjectSMCHelper>>>,
   288→    ws_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<ObjectWeaponStatusHelper>>>,
   289→    defection_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<ObjectDefectionHelper>>>,
   290→    status_damage_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<StatusDamageHelper>>>,
   291→    subdual_damage_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<SubdualDamageHelper>>>,
   292→    temp_weapon_bonus_helper: Option<Arc<Mutex<TempWeaponBonusHelper>>>,
   293→    firing_tracker: Option<Arc<Mutex<FiringTracker>>>,
   294→    
   295→    // Spatial and partition data
   296→    partition_data: Option<Arc<Mutex<PartitionData>>>,
   297→    radar_data: Option<Arc<Mutex<RadarObject>>>,
   298→    
   299→    // Vision and detection
   300→    partition_last_look: SightingInfo,
   301→    partition_reveal_all_last_look: SightingInfo,
   302→    partition_last_shroud: SightingInfo,
   303→    partition_last_threat: SightingInfo,
   304→    partition_last_value: SightingInfo,
   305→    vision_spied_by: [i32; MAX_PLAYER_COUNT],
   306→    vision_spied_mask: PlayerMaskType,
   307→    vision_range: Real,
   308→    shroud_clearing_range: Real,
   309→    shroud_range: Real,
   310→    
   311→    // Containment
   312→    contained_by: Option<Weak<RwLock<Object>>>,
   313→    xfer_contained_by_id: ObjectID,
   314→    contained_by_frame: UnsignedInt,
   315→    
   316→    // Construction and upgrades
   317→    construction_percent: Real,
   318→    object_upgrades_completed: UpgradeMaskType,
   319→    
   320→    // Group membership
   321→    group: Option<Arc<RwLock<AiGroup>>>,
   322→    
   323→    // Experience and combat
   324→    experience_tracker: Option<Arc<Mutex<ExperienceTracker>>>,
   325→    
   326→    // Weapons and combat
   327→    weapon_set: WeaponSet,
   328→    cur_weapon_set_flags: WeaponSetFlags,
   329→    weapon_bonus_condition: WeaponBonusConditionFlags,
   330→    last_weapon_condition: [u8; WEAPONSLOT_COUNT],
   331→    special_power_bits: SpecialPowerMaskType,
   332→    
   333→    // Healing tracking (for non-stacking healers)
   334→    sole_healing_benefactor_id: ObjectID,
   335→    sole_healing_benefactor_expiration_frame: UnsignedInt,
   336→    
   337→    // Disabled states
   338→    disabled_mask: DisabledMaskType,
   339→    disabled_till_frame: [UnsignedInt; DISABLED_COUNT],
   340→    smc_until: UnsignedInt,
   341→    
   342→    // Trigger areas
   343→    trigger_info: [TriggerInfo; MAX_TRIGGER_AREA_INFOS],
   344→    entered_or_exited_frame: UnsignedInt,
   345→    num_trigger_areas_active: u8,
   346→    
   347→    // Pathfinding
   348→    layer: PathfindLayerEnum,
   349→    destination_layer: PathfindLayerEnum,
   350→    
   351→    // Formation
   352→    formation_id: FormationID,
   353→    formation_offset: Coord2D,
   354→    
   355→    // Command overrides
   356→    command_set_string_override: AsciiString,
   357→    
   358→    // Rendering
   359→    safe_occlusion_frame: UnsignedInt,
   360→    
   361→    // Drawable association
   362→    drawable: Option<Arc<RwLock<Drawable>>>,
   363→    
   364→    // Flags
   365→    is_selectable: bool,
   366→    modules_ready: bool,
   367→    single_use_command_used: bool,
   368→    is_receiving_difficulty_bonus: bool,
   369→    
   370→    #[cfg(any(debug_assertions, feature = "internal"))]
   371→    has_died_already: bool,
   372→}
   373→
   374→impl Object {
   375→    /// Creates a new Object instance
   376→    pub fn new(
   377→        thing_template: Arc<dyn ThingTemplate>,
   378→        object_status_mask: ObjectStatusMaskType,
   379→        team: Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>>,
   380→    ) -> Result<Arc<RwLock<Self>>, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   381→        let mut obj = Self {
   382→            id: INVALID_ID,
   383→            producer_id: INVALID_ID,
   384→            builder_id: INVALID_ID,
   385→            name: AsciiString::from(),
   386→            
   387→            next: None,
   388→            prev: None,
   389→            
   390→            status: object_status_mask,
   391→            private_status: 0,
   392→            script_status: 0,
   393→            
   394→            geometry_info: thing_template.get_template_geometry_info(),
   395→            health_box_offset: Coord3D::origin(),
   396→            i_pos: ICoord3D::origin(),
   397→            
   398→            team: None,
   399→            original_team_name: AsciiString::from(),
   400→            indicator_color: Color::default(),
   401→            
   402→            behaviors: Vec::new(),
   403→            body: None,
   404→            contain: None,
   405→            stealth: None,
   406→            ai: None,
   407→            physics: None,
   408→            
   409→            repulsor_helper: None,
   410→            smc_helper: None,
   411→            ws_helper: None,
   412→            defection_helper: None,
   413→            status_damage_helper: None,
   414→            subdual_damage_helper: None,
   415→            temp_weapon_bonus_helper: None,
   416→            firing_tracker: None,
   417→            
   418→            partition_data: None,
   419→            radar_data: None,
   420→            
   421→            partition_last_look: SightingInfo::new(),
   422→            partition_reveal_all_last_look: SightingInfo::new(),
   423→            partition_last_shroud: SightingInfo::new(),
   424→            partition_last_threat: SightingInfo::new(),
   425→            partition_last_value: SightingInfo::new(),
   426→            vision_spied_by: [0; MAX_PLAYER_COUNT],
   427→            vision_spied_mask: PlayerMaskType::none(),
   428→            vision_range: thing_template.calc_vision_range(),
   429→            shroud_clearing_range: {
   430→                let range = thing_template.calc_shroud_clearing_range();
   431→                if range < 0.0 { thing_template.calc_vision_range() } else { range }
   432→            },
   433→            shroud_range: 0.0,
   434→            
   435→            contained_by: None,
   436→            xfer_contained_by_id: INVALID_ID,
   437→            contained_by_frame: 0,
   438→            
   439→            construction_percent: CONSTRUCTION_COMPLETE,
   440→            object_upgrades_completed: UpgradeMaskType::none(),
   441→            
   442→            group: None,
   443→            experience_tracker: None,
   444→            
   445→            weapon_set: WeaponSet::new(),
   446→            cur_weapon_set_flags: WeaponSetFlags::new(),
   447→            weapon_bonus_condition: WeaponBonusConditionFlags::empty(),
   448→            last_weapon_condition: [0; WEAPONSLOT_COUNT],
   449→            special_power_bits: SpecialPowerMaskType::none(),
   450→            
   451→            sole_healing_benefactor_id: INVALID_ID,
   452→            sole_healing_benefactor_expiration_frame: NEVER,
   453→            
   454→            disabled_mask: DisabledMaskType::none(),
   455→            disabled_till_frame: [NEVER; DISABLED_COUNT],
   456→            smc_until: NEVER,
   457→            
   458→            trigger_info: Default::default(),
   459→            entered_or_exited_frame: 0,
   460→            num_trigger_areas_active: 0,
   461→            
   462→            layer: PathfindLayerEnum::Ground,
   463→            destination_layer: PathfindLayerEnum::Ground,
   464→            
   465→            formation_id: FormationID::None,
   466→            formation_offset: Coord2D::origin(),
   467→            
   468→            command_set_string_override: AsciiString::from(),
   469→            safe_occlusion_frame: 0,
   470→            drawable: None,
   471→            
   472→            is_selectable: thing_template.is_kind_of(KindOf::Selectable),
   473→            modules_ready: false,
   474→            single_use_command_used: false,
   475→            is_receiving_difficulty_bonus: false,
   476→            
   477→            #[cfg(any(debug_assertions, feature = "internal"))]
   478→            has_died_already: false,
   479→        };
   480→        
   481→        // Set team (either provided or neutral)
   482→        obj.set_team(team)?;
   483→        
   484→        // Initialize modules (this would be quite complex in practice)
   485→        obj.init_modules(&thing_template)?;
   486→        
   487→        // Create experience tracker
   488→        obj.experience_tracker = Some(Arc::new(Mutex::new(ExperienceTracker::new(&obj))));
   489→        
   490→        // Mark modules as ready
   491→        obj.modules_ready = true;
   492→        
   493→        Ok(Arc::new(RwLock::new(obj)))
   494→    }
   495→    
   496→    /// Initialize object after creation
   497→    pub fn init_object(&mut self) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   498→        // Object initialization logic
   499→        Ok(())
   500→    }
   501→    
   502→    /// Called during object destruction
   503→    pub fn on_destroy(&mut self) {
   504→        // Cleanup logic
   505→    }
   506→    
   507→    // Core identification methods
   508→    pub fn get_id(&self) -> ObjectID {
   509→        self.id
   510→    }
   511→    
   512→    pub fn get_name(&self) -> &AsciiString {
   513→        &self.name
   514→    }
   515→    
   516→    pub fn set_name(&mut self, name: AsciiString) {
   517→        self.name = name;
   518→    }
   519→    
   520→    // Linked list navigation
   521→    pub fn get_next_object(&self) -> Option<Arc<RwLock<Object>>> {
   522→        self.next.clone()
   523→    }
   524→    
   525→    // Producer/Builder relationships
   526→    pub fn get_producer_id(&self) -> ObjectID {
   527→        self.producer_id
   528→    }
   529→    
   530→    pub fn set_producer(&mut self, obj: Option<&Object>) {
   531→        self.producer_id = obj.map(|o| o.get_id()).unwrap_or(INVALID_ID);
   532→    }
   533→    
   534→    pub fn get_builder_id(&self) -> ObjectID {
   535→        self.builder_id
   536→    }
   537→    
   538→    pub fn set_builder(&mut self, obj: Option<&Object>) {
   539→        self.builder_id = obj.map(|o| o.get_id()).unwrap_or(INVALID_ID);
   540→    }
   541→    
   542→    // Team management
   543→    pub fn get_team(&self) -> Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>> {
   544→        self.team.clone()
   545→    }
   546→    
   547→    pub fn set_team(&mut self, team: Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>>) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   548→        self.set_or_restore_team(team, false)
   549→    }
   550→    
   551→    pub fn set_temporary_team(&mut self, team: Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>>) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   552→        // Set team but don't change original team
   553→        self.team = team;
   554→        Ok(())
   555→    }
   556→    
   557→    pub fn restore_original_team(&mut self) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   558→        // Implementation would restore from original_team_name
   559→        Ok(())
   560→    }
   561→    
   562→    // Status management
   563→    pub fn is_destroyed(&self) -> bool {
   564→        self.test_status(ObjectStatusTypes::Destroyed)
   565→    }
   566→    
   567→    pub fn is_airborne_target(&self) -> bool {
   568→        self.test_status(ObjectStatusTypes::AirborneTarget)
   569→    }
   570→    
   571→    pub fn get_status_bits(&self) -> ObjectStatusMaskType {
   572→        self.status
   573→    }
   574→    
   575→    pub fn test_status(&self, bit: ObjectStatusTypes) -> bool {
   576→        self.status.test(bit)
   577→    }
   578→    
   579→    pub fn set_status(&mut self, object_status: ObjectStatusMaskType, set: bool) {
   580→        if set {
   581→            self.status.set(object_status);
   582→        } else {
   583→            self.status.clear(object_status);
   584→        }
   585→    }
   586→    
   587→    pub fn clear_status(&mut self, object_status: ObjectStatusMaskType) {
   588→        self.set_status(object_status, false);

   591→    // Script status management
   592→    pub fn test_script_status_bit(&self, bit: ObjectScriptStatusBit) -> bool {
   593→        (self.script_status & (1 << (bit as u8))) != 0
   594→    }
   595→    
   596→    pub fn set_script_status(&mut self, bit: ObjectScriptStatusBit, set: bool) {
   597→        if set {
   598→            self.script_status |= 1 << (bit as u8);
   599→        } else {
   600→            self.script_status &= !(1 << (bit as u8));
   601→        }
   602→    }
   603→    
   604→    pub fn clear_script_status(&mut self, bit: ObjectScriptStatusBit) {
   605→        self.set_script_status(bit, false);
   606→    }

   778→    pub fn is_disabled_by_type(&self, disabled_type: DisabledType) -> bool {
   779→        self.disabled_mask.test(disabled_type)
   780→    }

   783→        self.disabled_mask.set(disabled_type);
   784→    }
   785→    
   786→    pub fn set_disabled_until(&mut self, disabled_type: DisabledType, frame: UnsignedInt) {
   787→        self.set_disabled(disabled_type);
   788→        if let Some(index) = self.get_disabled_type_index(disabled_type) {
   789→            self.disabled_till_frame[index] = frame;
   790→        }
   791→    }
   792→    
   793→    pub fn clear_disabled(&mut self, disabled_type: DisabledType) -> bool {
   794→        let was_disabled = self.is_disabled_by_type(disabled_type);
   795→        self.disabled_mask.clear(disabled_type);
   796→        if let Some(index) = self.get_disabled_type_index(disabled_type) {
   797→            self.disabled_till_frame[index] = NEVER;
   798→        }
   799→        was_disabled
   800→    }
   801→    
   802→    pub fn check_disabled_status(&mut self) {
   803→        // Check timers and clear expired disabled states
   804→        for i in 0..DISABLED_COUNT {
   805→            if self.disabled_till_frame[i] != NEVER {
   806→                // Check if expired (would need current frame from game state)
   807→                // if current_frame >= self.disabled_till_frame[i] {
   808→                //     self.clear_disabled(disabled_type_from_index(i));
   809→                // }
   810→            }
   811→        }
   812→    }

   849→    fn set_or_restore_team(&mut self, team: Option<Arc<RwLock<Team>>>, restoring: bool) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
   850→        if !restoring && team.is_some() {
   851→            // Set original team name when setting team for first time
   852→            if let Some(team_ref) = &team {
   853→                if let Ok(team_lock) = team_ref.try_read() {
   854→                    self.original_team_name = team_lock.get_name().clone();
   855→                }
   856→            }
   857→        }
   858→        
   859→        self.team = team;
   860→        Ok(())
   861→    }

   873→// Extension methods for update module support
   874→impl Object {
   875→    /// Get current health
   876→    pub fn get_health(&self) -> f32 {
   877→        if let Some(body) = &self.body {
   878→            if let Ok(body_guard) = body.lock() {
   879→                return body_guard.get_health();
   880→            }
   881→        }
   882→        100.0 // Default health
   883→    }
   884→
   885→    /// Get maximum health
   886→    pub fn get_max_health(&self) -> f32 {
   887→        if let Some(body) = &self.body {
   888→            if let Ok(body_guard) = body.lock() {
   889→                return body_guard.get_max_health();
   890→            }
   891→        }
   892→        100.0 // Default max health
   893→    }
   894→
   895→    /// Set health directly
   896→    pub fn set_health(&mut self, health: f32) {
   897→        if let Some(body) = &self.body {
   898→            if let Ok(mut body_guard) = body.lock() {
   899→                body_guard.set_health(health);
   900→            }
   901→        }
   902→    }
   903→
   904→    /// Heal the object by a specific amount
   905→    pub fn heal(&mut self, amount: f32) {
   906→        let current = self.get_health();
   907→        let max = self.get_max_health();
   908→        let new_health = (current + amount).min(max);
   909→        self.set_health(new_health);
   910→    }

   954→    /// Distance to another object
   955→    pub fn distance_to(&self, other: &Object) -> f32 {
   956→        let pos1 = self.get_position();
   957→        let pos2 = other.get_position();
   958→        ((pos1.x - pos2.x).powi(2) + (pos1.y - pos2.y).powi(2) + (pos1.z - pos2.z).powi(2)).sqrt()
   959→    }

   965→        self.trigger_event("apply_force", &bincode::serialize(&force_data).unwrap()).await

  1181→                "Object {} ({}) [Team: {}]",
  1182→                self.id,
  1183→                self.name,
  1184→                self.team.as_ref()
  1185→                    .and_then(|t| t.try_read().ok())
  1186→                    .map(|t| t.get_name().as_str())
  1187→                    .unwrap_or("None")
  1188→            )
  1189→        } else {
  1190→            write!(
  1191→                f,
  1192→                "Object {} [Team: {}]",
  1193→                self.id,
  1194→                self.team.as_ref()
  1195→                    .and_then(|t| t.try_read().ok())
  1196→                    .map(|t| t.get_name().as_str())
  1197→                    .unwrap_or("None")
  1198→            )
  1199→        }
  1200→    }
  1201→}
